rulings.Case Title: MARIE TATMAN VS. ELIJAH WHITE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 2, 2018 line 1. PLAINTIFF MARIE TATMAN's Motion To Amend Complaint Hearing Required to address rescheduling of the Motion for Summary Judgment. Specifically, whether Plaintiff is stipulating to a shortened notice for Motion for Summary Judgment on First Amended Complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1900 BRYANT STREET INVESTORS LLC VS. ERIN MILGRAM
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Stirke Portions Of First Amended Cross Complainant'S Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 2, 2018 line 6. Cross-Defendant 1900 Bryant Street Investors, LLC's Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Cross Complainant's Complaint GRANTED with leave to amend for Cross-Complainant to allege facts (not conclusions) to support malice, oppression, or fraud. All amendments shall be in bold font. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN GUTIERREZ VS. ILENA PERICH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Carlos Alvarez'S Motion To Set Aside Default/Default Judgment/Leave To Defend
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 2, 2018 line 2. Defendant Carlos Alvarez'S Motion To Set Aside Default/Default Judgment/Leave To Defend GRANTED. Defendant to file and serve an answer no later than October 3, 2018 by 4:00 p.m. Defendant was properly served by a registered process server. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NIMER MASSIS VS. JEREMY BRIGGS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 2, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANTs JEREMY BIGGS and ANGELA BIGGS' Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint GRANTED. No opposition filed. Cross-Complaint to be filed and served no later than October 2, 2018. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOEL DROUET VS. JOHNNY HANSELL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 2, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT JOHNNY HANSELL's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff shall allege facts in support of non-speculative damages as to each cause of action. Plaintiff shall also allege facts (not conclusions) to support each element of each cause of action. Plaintiff shall only make amendments in good faith and in light of authorities cited by defendant. All amendments to be in bold font. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JIRIES JABR HANHAN ET AL VS. EMILIO RAMIREZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 2, 2018 line 5. PLAINTIFFs JIRIES HANHAN and SHAIR HANHAN's MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT Hearing Required. Defendant must be present. Parties may bring their witnesses (limited to individual who submitted declarations in support of and in opposition to the motion). Witness testimony will be allowed, if necessary. = (501/REQ)
